# Command conformance evidence

The October 10, 2025 renderer profile contains 94 supported, 11 partial, and 2 unsupported rendering/job commands. Partial and unsupported limitations are listed in the table. `commandConformance.test.ts` is an identity and capability-regression smoke test; it does not by itself prove semantic dispatch. The remaining columns point to the deeper category and command-specific suites that exercise semantic behavior, persistence, and raster output. Representative output is pinned with raster hashes, and barcode families are decoded by the independent test-only ZXing implementation where supported by that decoder.

All 116 device-only commands are parsed by full identity and rendered against a blank control label in `commandConformance.test.ts`. Their packed rasters must be byte-identical to the control while returning `NON_RENDERING_COMMAND`.

| Command | Status | Limitations | Identity smoke | Semantic evidence | Raster evidence |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `^A` | supported | ŌĆö | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `interpreter.test.ts`, `rendering.test.ts` | `rendering.test.ts`, `renderingCommands.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `^A@` | supported | ŌĆö | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `interpreter.test.ts`, `rendering.test.ts` | `rendering.test.ts`, `renderingCommands.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `^B0` | supported | ŌĆö | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `interpreter.test.ts`, `extendedBarcodes.test.ts`, specialized encoder suites | `barcodeConformance.test.ts`, `extendedBarcodes.test.ts`, independent ZXing decode |

| `^CI` | partial | Table-specific EUC-CN and non-GB18030 ^CI16/^CI26 variants are not inferred without a compatible downloaded mapping; standard Unicode, Western, Shift-JIS, EUC-JP, and GB18030 paths are implemented. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `interpreter.test.ts`, `rendering.test.ts` | `rendering.test.ts`, `renderingCommands.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `~DY` | partial | Legacy BAR-ONE AR-compressed (C) payloads are diagnosed but not decoded. Image decoding covers non-interlaced 1/2/4/8-bit grayscale or indexed PNG plus 8-bit-per-channel grayscale-alpha, RGB, or RGBA PNG; Windows BMP and OS/2 1.x core-header BMP; and 1-bit planar, 8-bit indexed/grayscale, or 24-bit RGB PCX. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `jobRenderer.test.ts`, `graphicDecoder.test.ts` | `jobRenderer.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `^FC` | partial | Localized weekday and month names use host Intl locale data; numeric clock fields remain deterministic, but localized wording can vary by runtime and printer firmware. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `interpreter.test.ts`, `rendering.test.ts` | `rendering.test.ts`, `renderingCommands.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `^FP` | partial | Vertical and reverse layout operates on Unicode code points rather than firmware combining semantic clusters. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `interpreter.test.ts`, `rendering.test.ts` | `rendering.test.ts`, `renderingCommands.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `^FT` | partial | Explicit text origins and text justification are modeled; omitted-coordinate continuation and printer-specific baseline/justification interactions for every field type are not fully reproduced. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `documentParser.test.ts`, `interpreter.test.ts`, `renderingCommands.test.ts` | `rendering.test.ts`, `renderingCommands.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `^GF` | partial | Zebra compressed-binary (C) payloads are diagnosed but not decoded. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `graphicDecoder.test.ts`, `renderingCommands.test.ts` | `renderingCommands.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `^KL` | partial | Localized weekday and month names use host Intl locale data and can vary by runtime and printer firmware. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `interpreter.test.ts`, `rendering.test.ts` | `jobRenderer.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `^PA` | partial | Bidirectional ordering and Arabic shaping use a deterministic subset rather than a full Unicode/OpenType layout engine; the default-glyph switch is not modeled. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `interpreter.test.ts`, `rendering.test.ts` | `rendering.test.ts`, `renderingCommands.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `^SF` | partial | Serialization is Unicode-code-point based; newer printer-firmware combining-cluster and control/bidirectional-character behavior is not modeled. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `interpreter.test.ts`, `rendering.test.ts` | `rendering.test.ts`, `renderingCommands.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `^SL` | partial | Localized weekday and month names use host Intl locale data and can vary by runtime and printer firmware. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `interpreter.test.ts`, `rendering.test.ts` | `rendering.test.ts`, `renderingCommands.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `^TB` | partial | Rotation, bounds, wrapping, truncation, and literal << escapes are modeled; other firmware complex-layout escape instructions are skipped. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `interpreter.test.ts`, `rendering.test.ts` | `rendering.test.ts`, `renderingCommands.test.ts`, `representativeLabels.test.ts` |
| `^JM` | unsupported | Changing printhead resolution inside a ZPL job is not modeled; select printDensity in the render options. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `documentParser.test.ts` | ŌĆö |
| `^SZ` | unsupported | ZPL mode 1 compatibility semantics are not modeled. | `commandConformance.test.ts` + `documentParser.test.ts` | `documentParser.test.ts` | ŌĆö |
